TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Hupu, title = Hupu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hupu} }

S.FORM: alang Hupu ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 56 buwan, 167 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 66% kyan ku 111 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 34% kyan ku 56 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 16%, Sakizaya 1%, Bunun 3%, Tayan 1%, Truku6 %, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hupu hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Hupu hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Hupu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hupu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hupu hya' ga Lalumaang. tay mkyahu' na Hupu hya' ga Palinkaan. tay 'llaw na Hupu hya' ga Paudadan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Hupu ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 56 buwan, 167 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 66% kyan ku 111 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 34% kyan ku 56 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 16%, Sakizaya 1%, Bunun 3%, Tayan 1%, Truku6 %, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hupu hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Hupu hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Hupu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hupu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hupu hya' ga Lalumaang. tay mkyahu' na Hupu hya' ga Palinkaan. tay 'llaw na Hupu hya' ga Paudadan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħupu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕinʦ~ʨima ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, s~ɕakizaja *%, βunun *%, tajan *%, truku* %, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħupu ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ħupu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħupu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħupu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħupu ħjaʔ ɣa lalumaaŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħupu ħjaʔ ɣa palinkaan. taj ʔllaw na ħupu ħjaʔ ɣa pau*a*an. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
